content.content:
4790	        return "❌ Command denied."

4792	    async def _handle_update_command(self, event: MessageEvent) -> str:
4793	        """Handle /update command — update Hermes Agent to the latest version.
4794	
4795	        Spawns ``hermes update`` in a detached session (via ``setsid``) so it
4796	        survives the gateway restart that ``hermes update`` may trigger. Marker
4797	        files are written so either the current gateway process or the next one
4798	        can notify the user when the update finishes.
4799	        """
4800	        import json
4801	        import shutil
4802	        import subprocess
4803	        from datetime import datetime
4804	        from hermes_cli.config import is_managed, format_managed_message
4805	
4806	        if is_managed():
4807	            return f"✗ {format_managed_message('update Hermes Agent')}"
4808	
4809	        project_root = Path(__file__).parent.parent.resolve()
4810	        git_dir = project_root / '.git'
4811	
4812	        if not git_dir.exists():
4813	            return "✗ Not a git repository — cannot update."
4814	
4815	        hermes_cmd = _resolve_hermes_bin()
4816	        if not hermes_cmd:
4817	            return (
4818	                "✗ Could not locate the `hermes` command. "
4819	                "Hermes is running, but the update command could not find the "
4820	                "executable on PATH or via the current Python interpreter. "
4821	                "Try running `hermes update` manually in your terminal."
4822	            )
4823	
4824	        pending_path = _hermes_home / ".update_pending.json"
4825	        output_path = _hermes_home / ".update_output.txt"
4826	        exit_code_path = _hermes_home / ".update_exit_code"
4827	        pending = {
4828	            "platform": event.source.platform.value,
4829	            "chat_id": event.source.chat_id,
4830	            "user_id": event.source.user_id,
4831	            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
4832	        }
4833	        pending_path.write_text(json.dumps(pending))
4834	        exit_code_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
4835	
4836	        # Spawn `hermes update` detached so it survives gateway restart.
4837	        # Use setsid for portable session detach (works under system services
4838	        # where systemd-run --user fails due to missing D-Bus session).
4839	        hermes_cmd_str = " ".join(shlex.quote(part) for part in hermes_cmd)
4840	        update_cmd = (
4841	            f"{hermes_cmd_str} update > {shlex.quote(str(output_path))} 2>&1; "
4842	            f"status=$?; printf '%s' \"$status\" > {shlex.quote(str(exit_code_path))}"
4843	        )
4844	        try:
4845	            setsid_bin = shutil.which("setsid")
4846	            if setsid_bin:
4847	                # Preferred: setsid creates a new session, fully detached
4848	                subprocess.Popen(
4849	                    [setsid_bin, "bash", "-c", update_cmd],
4850	                    stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,
4851	                    stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,
4852	                    start_new_session=True,
4853	                )
4854	            else:
4855	                # Fallback: start_new_session=True calls os.setsid() in child
4856	                subprocess.Popen(
4857	                    ["bash", "-c", update_cmd],
4858	                    stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,
4859	                    stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,
4860	                    start_new_session=True,
4861	                )
4862	        except Exception as e:
4863	            pending_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
4864	            exit_code_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
4865	            return f"✗ Failed to start update: {e}"
4866	
4867	        self._schedule_update_notification_watch()
4868	        return "⚕ Starting Hermes update… I'll notify you when it's done."
4869
